title: Plan Sync saved groups — cleaner edit flow
description:
Removed the blue editing banner from Plan Sync when you edit a saved group. The builder header already shows edit mode; Cancel edit remains next to Save changes. Saved group selection stays green without extra blue highlights.

Who is affected: PipeSync users using Plan Sync on pipeshare.live.
changeLog: Removed blue edit banner and duplicate Cancel button from Plan Sync builder.
Saved group rows stay green when selected or editing — no blue overlay.
Prior: click-to-select, Edit/Delete header buttons, green highlight (hl51).
